title: GXO Celebrates 20 Years of Growth in Poland Fueled by  Innovation and Community Impact
description:
With over 450,000 sqm and 4,000 employees, GXO’s Polish operations
are its largest in Central Europe

title: Alvotech to Report Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
description: REYKJAVIK, Iceland, March 04, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Alvotech (NASDAQ: ALVO) (the “Company”), a global biotechnology company specializing in the development and manufacture of biosimilar medicines for patients worldwide, today announced that it will release its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial and operating results on Wednesday, March 18, 2026, after the U.S. markets close.

title: Alvotech to Report Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
description: REYKJAVIK, ICELAND (March 4, 2026) — Alvotech (NASDAQ: ALVO) (the “Company”), a global biotechnology company specializing in the development and manufacture of biosimilar medicines for patients worldwide, today announced that it will release its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial and operating results on Wednesday, March 18, 2026, after the U.S. markets close.

title: Alvotech kynnir uppgjör ársins 2025 þann 19. mars nk.
description: REYKJAVÍK (4. Mars 2026) – Alvotech (NASDAQ: ALVO) mun birta uppgjör ársins 2025 og fjórða ársfjórðungs miðvikudaginn 18. Mars 2026, eftir lokun markaða í Bandaríkjunum. Fundur til kynningar á uppgjörinu verður sendur út í beinu streymi og hefst kl. 12, fimmtudaginn 19. Mars 2026.

title: Notice to the Annual General Meeting of Suominen Corporation
description: Notice is given to the shareholders of Suominen Corporation to the Annual General Meeting to be held on Wednesday, April 15, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. (EEST).

title: Kutsu Suominen Oyj:n varsinaiseen yhtiökokoukseen
description: Suominen Oyj:n osakkeenomistajat kutsutaan varsinaiseen yhtiökokoukseen, joka pidetään keskiviikkona 15.4.2026 klo 13.00 alkaen.

title: INVL Baltic Real Estate increased its credit limit under the credit agreement
description: INVL Baltic Real Estate (hereinafter – the “Company”) informs that on 3 March 2026 it signed an agreement with AB Artea bank (hereinafter – the “Bank”) regarding an amendment to the existing credit agreement.

title: „INVL Baltic Real Estate“ padidino kredito limitą pagal kredito sutartį
description: „INVL Baltic Real Estate“ (toliau – „Bendrovė“) informuoja, kad 2026 m. kovo  3 d. pasirašė susitarimą su AB Artea bankas (toliau – „Bankas“) dėl kredito sutarties pakeitimo.

title: Response to attacks against Carbios and its executives
description: Clermont-Ferrand (France), March 4, 2026 (8:45 a.m. CET). Carbios (Euronext Growth Paris : ALCRB) denounces the destabilization operation to which it has been subjected for several months and formally contests all allegations made against the Company and its executives in proceedings initiated by its former executive.

title: Réaction aux attaques visant Carbios et ses dirigeants
description: Clermont-Ferrand (France), 4 mars 2026 (08h45 CET). Carbios (Euronext Growth Paris : ALCRB) dénonce la campagne de déstabilisation dont elle fait l’objet depuis plusieurs mois et conteste formellement l’ensemble des griefs formulés à son encontre et à l’encontre de ses dirigeants dans le cadre de procédures engagées par son ancien dirigeant.

title: Ophævelse af suspension
description: Der anmodes om ophævelse af suspension for følgende afdeling:

title: VEON’s Beeline Uzbekistan and Rakuten Symphony  Partner for Open RAN, AI Collaboration
description: Tokyo, Tashkent and Barcelona , March 4, 2026 – VEON Ltd. (Nasdaq: VEON), a global digital operator, and Rakuten Group, Inc. today announce that Beeline Uzbekistan, VEON’s digital operator in Uzbekistan, and Rakuten Symphony, a subsidiary of Rakuten Group, have signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to explore strategic collaborations that support the development of Uzbekistan’s fast-growing digital economy, including on Open RAN development, AI-powered network inte

title: Publication of KPN’s AGM 2026 agenda
description: Today, Royal KPN N.V. ("KPN") published the agenda of the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders ("AGM"), which will take place at KPN's headquarters in Rotterdam on 15 April 2026. The AGM will be organized in a hybrid format, allowing shareholders to attend either in person or virtually.

title: Announcement of the unaudited net asset value of INVL Technology as of 31 December 2025
description: As provided in Section XI ‘Calculation of the Net Asset Value’ of the Articles of Association of INVL Technology, the unaudited net asset value of the Company was EUR 64,624,072 or EUR 5.4013 per share on 31 December 2025. The Company‘s audited Net Asset Value will be reported together with the audited annual management report.

title: Skelbiama „INVL Technology“ neaudituota grynųjų aktyvų vertė 2025 m. gruodžio 31 d.
description: Atsižvelgiant į „INVL Technology“ įstatų XI skyrių „Grynųjų aktyvų vertės  skaičiavimas“, skelbiama bendrovės neaudituota grynųjų aktyvų vertė 2025 m. gruodžio 31 d. yra 64 624 072 eurai arba 5,4013 euro akcijai. Bendrovės audituota grynųjų aktyvų vertė bus skelbiama kartu su audituota metine vadovybės ataskaita.

title: Preliminary “INVL Technology” 2025 operating results
description: As of 31 December 2025, according to preliminary data, the equity and net asset value of “INVL Technology” amounted to EUR 64.6 million – 26% more than a year ago – and their value per share was EUR 5.4.

title: Preliminarūs „INVL Technology“ 2025 m. veiklos rezultatai
description: 2025 m. gruodžio 31 d. preliminariais duomenimis, „INVL Technology“ nuosavas kapitalas ir grynųjų aktyvų vertė sudarė 64,6 mln. eurų – 26 proc. daugiau nei prieš metus, o jų vertė akcijai – 5,4 euro.

title: Sanoma Corporation, Managers’ Transactions
